Best Performing ESG ETFs for Q3 2020
Sustainable investing is taking Wall Street by storm—but there's plenty of room for growth in ETFs

holdings.infoBox: SUSA is an equity ETF with a total of 197 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.72%, Apple at 6.35%, Microsoft at 4.14%, Alphabet at 3.49%, and Broadcom at 2.74%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Optimized MSCI USA ETF (SUSA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Extended ESG Select index. The fund tracks an index of US companies with high environmental, social and governance (ESG) factor scores as calculated by MSCI. SUSA was launched on Jan 24, 2005 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Extended ESG Select Index
